official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound set_entity_motion fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official entity id plus movement body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns set_entity_motion to packet id 0x65.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the set_entity_motion id to ClientboundSetEntityMotionPacket.
The official set_entity_motion body is one VarInt entity id followed by Vec3.LP_STREAM_CODEC movement.
The fixture uses a primitive entity id and Vec3 only and does not require initialized entity, Level, or render state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded movement fields, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove entity existence, movement semantics, world state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer entity existence, movement semantics, world state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
